title: President Trump proposes cutting funding to E-Verify program
description_html: President Trump's FY2020 budget proposes an 8 percent funding cut to the E-Verify program. The Trump administration requests only $122 million in fiscal year 2020, compared to $133 million in fiscal years 2019 and 2018. USCIS states that a higher funding level is no longer needed because of technological modernization. [ID #549]
